metadata.label: Z-Wave application framework API build number
O1: Minimum Time Between Power Reports
Motor Limit Detection
metadata.description: Power threshold used to detect a limit switch. Increase this value if the device falsely detects limit switches.

metadata.label: Limit Detection Delay Time
metadata.description: Defines the delay before motor power is read after a relay switches ON.

metadata.label: Stop Delay Time After Limit Detected
Shutter Max Moving Time
metadata.description: Defines the maximum time the motor can move before stopping.

metadata.label: Factory Reset
metadata.description: Reset to factory default settings and remove from the Z-Wave network.
